name: Al's Chocolate to the Max
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the whipping cream until it just begins to boil.
2. In a blender, combine the chocolate chips, egg, vanilla, almond extract, and Creme de Cacao liqueur.
3. Add the hot cream while the blender is running.
4. Blend until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into small sherbet or wine glasses (disposable plastic ones).
6. Refrigerate for several hours.
Few people refuse one of these, and few can eat more than one.
